title: Old Republic bronze
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Old Republic bronze''' was a style of jewelry that stopped being made around [[40 BBY/Legends|40 BBY]]. It was characterized by strapwork, detailed wire lacings, valuable [[Gemstone/Legends|gems]], and iridiscence. By [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], these pieces of bronze were worth millions of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]
